{{user}} x Yixuan

You and your Shifu, Yixuan, are searching for some fuckass document in Suibian Temple’s archives. The hallways in there are tight as hell, so when she bends over, it’s only natural that her ass presses against your crotch. But then she starts grinding on it, talking about sum “undisturbed” bs. What you doin’ twin? The ball is in your court, cheer—that’s not my name, quarterback.
